sections.description: AI-powered CSS/JS asset scanner for WordPress.
sections.changelog: Version 1.7.73b (beta): results-table clarity. A completed S:0 A:0 row the worker did not flag as an ET candidate is a converged no-unloads verdict, so it now reads 'Nothing to unload found on this page — a rescan occasionally finds more' instead of the misleading 'Please scan again' (ET-candidate rows keep their existing rescan prompts). The S / A / N results column gains a '?' tooltip defining Safe, Aggressive, and Needed. Carries all of 1.7.72b (security-stack/CDN name single-sourcing) and earlier.
